act_name: The Value Added Tax and Supplementary Duty Act
section_title: A supply of goods used only in cases of supplies of exempted supplies by a
content:
12. A supply of goods used only in cases of supplies of exempted supplies by a
registered person or if the good is a passenger vehicle, where such person pays
input tax, but is not entitled to tax credits, the supply of such good.
Non-commercial activities of approved charitable institutions
